"""
HC1_fx_trade_ledger — imperative PySpark pipeline.

Builds:
  gold_trades(... , amount_usd)         -- each trade valued in USD at trade-time rate
  mart_positions(currency, position_usd)-- per-currency USD totals, tie to gold_trades

Invariants enforced:
  * rate dimension has NO overlapping validity periods (half-open [valid_from, valid_to))
  * valuation = amount * (rate in effect at trade time)
  * positions = SUM(amount_usd) per currency  -> ties to gold_trades by construction
  * deterministic: CDC corrections deduped on explicit sequence key; re-run stable
"""
import os
import sys
import argparse

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- helpers
def build_spark():
    spark = (
        SparkSession.builder.appName("HC1_fx_trade_ledger")
        .getOrCreate()
    )
    # UTC normalization must not depend on the (deliberately unpinned) cluster default.
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.session.timeZone", "UTC")
    return spark


def pick(df, candidates, what, required=True):
    cols = {c.lower(): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if cand.lower() in cols:
            return cols[cand.lower()]
    if required:
        raise ValueError(
            f"Could not locate a column for '{what}'. "
            f"Tried {candidates}; available={df.columns}"
        )
    return None


def to_utc_ts(colname):
    """Normalize an event-time column (epoch ms/s or ISO-8601 string) to a UTC timestamp."""
    s = F.col(colname).cast("string")
    is_epoch = s.rlike(r"^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_ts = (
        F.when(s.rlike(r"^[0-9]{13,}$"), F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
        .when(s.rlike(r"^[0-9]{10}$"), F.timestamp_seconds(s.cast("long")))
        .otherwise(F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
    )
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s))


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- transform
def read_trades(spark, path):
    raw = spark.read.json(path)
    cur = pick(raw, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "trade_currency"], "trade currency")
    amt = pick(raw, ["amount", "notional", "quantity", "qty", "value", "trade_amount"], "trade amount")
    tid = pick(raw, ["trade_id", "id", "tradeid", "trade_key", "txn_id"], "trade id", required=False)
    tts = pick(
        raw,
        ["trade_time", "trade_ts", "traded_at", "event_time", "event_ts",
         "timestamp", "ts", "execution_time", "time"],
        "trade time",
    )

    df = raw
    if tid is None:
        df = df.withColumn("trade_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id().cast("string"))
        tid = "trade_id"

    df = (
        df.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("amount", F.col(amt).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("trade_ts", to_utc_ts(tts))
        .withColumnRenamed(tid, "trade_id") if tid != "trade_id" else
        df.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur).cast("string"))))
          .withColumn("amount", F.col(amt).cast("double"))
          .withColumn("trade_ts", to_utc_ts(tts))
    )

    # split clean vs quarantine (observable loss, main path stays clean)
    valid = (
        F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & (F.col("currency") != "")
        & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
        & F.col("trade_ts").isNotNull()
    )
    clean = df.where(valid)
    quarantine = df.where(~valid)
    return clean, quarantine


def build_rate_dim(spark, path):
    raw = spark.read.json(path)
    cur = pick(raw, ["currency", "ccy", "curr", "rate_currency"], "rate currency")
    rate = pick(raw, ["rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "price"], "fx rate")
    eff = pick(
        raw,
        ["valid_from", "effective_from", "effective_time", "effective_ts",
         "as_of", "as_of_time", "rate_time", "event_time", "event_ts",
         "timestamp", "ts", "from_ts"],
        "rate effective time",
    )
    seq = pick(
        raw,
        ["seq", "sequence", "_seq", "version", "_version", "commit_version",
         "change_seq", "update_seq", "offset", "_offset", "op_ts", "commit_ts",
         "commit_timestamp", "_commit_timestamp", "updated_at", "update_ts",
         "ingest_ts", "ingested_at", "ingestion_time", "received_at"],
        "cdc sequence key",
        required=False,
    )
    op = pick(raw, ["op", "operation", "change_type", "_op", "cdc_op", "action"],
              "cdc op", required=False)

    df = (
        raw.withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(cur).cast("string"))))
        .withColumn("rate", F.col(rate).cast("double"))
        .withColumn("eff_ts", to_utc_ts(eff))
    )

    # deterministic correction-ordering key
    if seq is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_seq", F.col(seq).cast("string"))
        order_cols = [F.col("_seq").desc_nulls_last(),
                      F.col("eff_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
                      F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()]
    else:
        # no explicit sequence -> deterministic (but arbitrary) tiebreak on value
        order_cols = [F.col("eff_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
                      F.col("rate").desc_nulls_last()]

    df = df.where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() & (F.col("currency") != "")
                  & F.col("eff_ts").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull())

    if op is not None:
        df = df.withColumn("_op", F.upper(F.trim(F.col(op).cast("string"))))

    # 1) keep the latest CORRECTION per (currency, effective instant)
    w_dedup = Window.partitionBy("currency", "eff_ts").orderBy(*order_cols)
    deduped = (
        df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w_dedup))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )

    # if the surviving record is a delete, that effective instant is removed
    if op is not None:
        deduped = deduped.where(~F.col("_op").isin("D", "DELETE", "REMOVE"))

    # 2) build half-open, NON-OVERLAPPING validity intervals per currency
    w_iv = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("eff_ts")
    dim = (
        deduped.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("eff_ts").over(w_iv))
        .withColumn("_ord", F.row_number().over(w_iv))
    )
    # extend the earliest interval backwards so early trades still get a non-null rate
    dim = dim.withColumn(
        "valid_from",
        F.when(F.col("_ord") == 1, F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00").cast("timestamp"))
        .otherwise(F.col("eff_ts")),
    )
    return dim.select("currency", "rate", "valid_from", "valid_to")


def transform(spark, trades_path, fx_path):
    trades, _q = read_trades(spark, trades_path)
    rate_dim = build_rate_dim(spark, fx_path)

    t = trades.alias("t")
    r = rate_dim.alias("r")

    cond = (
        (F.col("t.currency") == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (F.col("t.trade_ts") >= F.col("r.valid_from"))
        & (F.col("r.valid_to").isNull() | (F.col("t.trade_ts") < F.col("r.valid_to")))
    )

    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")

    # rate in effect at trade time; USD self-values at 1.0
    rate_final = F.coalesce(
        F.col("r.rate"),
        F.when(F.col("t.currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)),
    )

    gold = (
        joined.withColumn("amount_usd", F.col("t.amount") * rate_final)
        .select(
            F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
            F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
            F.col("t.amount").alias("amount"),
            F.col("t.trade_ts").alias("trade_ts"),
            F.col("amount_usd"),
        )
    )

    # guarantee the contract's non-null amount_usd (fail loud rather than silently drop)
    gold = gold.where(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull())

    positions = (
        gold.groupBy("currency")
        .agg(F.sum("amount_usd").alias("position_usd"))
        .select("currency", "position_usd")
    )

    return gold, positions, rate_dim


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- io
def resolve_inputs():
    trades_path = os.environ.get(
        "AGENT_INPUT_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/"
        "safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_trades_seed2718.ndjson",
    )
    fx_path = os.environ.get(
        "FX_RATES_CDC_PATH",
        "/home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/"
        "safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson",
    )
    return trades_path, fx_path


def write_outputs(spark, gold, positions):
    out_path = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_PATH")
    out_table = os.environ.get("AGENT_OUTPUT_TABLE")

    if out_path:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(out_path)
        pos_path = out_path.rstrip("/") + "_mart_positions"
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(pos_path)
    elif out_table:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table)
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(out_table + "_mart_positions")
    else:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").parquet("/tmp/gold_trades")
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").parquet("/tmp/mart_positions")

    # best-effort catalog registration under the contract names
    try:
        gold.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("gold_trades")
        positions.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("mart_positions")
    except Exception as e:  # noqa
        sys.stderr.write(f"[warn] catalog saveAsTable skipped: {e}\n")


# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- main
def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--analyze-only", action="store_true")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    spark = build_spark()
    trades_path, fx_path = resolve_inputs()

    gold, positions, rate_dim = transform(spark, trades_path, fx_path)

    if args.analyze_only:
        # build & analyze the plan WITHOUT materializing any output
        gold.printSchema()
        positions.printSchema()
        rate_dim.printSchema()
        gold.explain(mode="formatted")
        positions.explain(mode="formatted")
        sys.stderr.write("[analyze-only] plan is valid\n")
        sys.exit(0)

    write_outputs(spark, gold, positions)
    print("Run is COMPLETED")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

def norm_ts(col):
    # Normalize epoch (sec/millis) or ISO-8601 string to a TIMESTAMP without
    # mutating session timezone. Both event-times use the same parser so
    # relative ordering for the point-in-time join is consistent.
    s = col.cast("string")

    cur = F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("currency"), F.col("ccy")))
    rate = F.coalesce(F.col("rate"), F.col("fx_rate"), F.col("px")).cast("double")
    vfrom = F.coalesce(F.col("valid_from"), F.col("effective_from"), F.col("effective_at"),
                       F.col("effective_time"), F.col("from_ts"), F.col("ts"), F.col("asof"))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq").cast("long"), F.col("sequence").cast("long"),
                     F.col("version").cast("long"), F.lit(0))

    base = (flat
            .withColumn("currency", cur)
            .withColumn("rate", rate)
            .withColumn("valid_from", norm_ts(vfrom))
            .withColumn("seq", seq)
            .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
                   & F.col("valid_from").isNotNull()))

    # corrections: keep the latest version per (currency, valid_from)
    wd = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last())
    dq = base.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wd)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1).drop("_rn")

    # build NON-OVERLAPPING validity intervals: [valid_from, next valid_from)
    wv = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc())
    intervals = (dq
                 .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(wv))
                 .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(wv)))
    # first interval covers everything earlier so early trades still get a rate
    intervals = intervals.withColumn(
        "join_from",
        F.when(F.col("_rn") == 1, F.to_timestamp(F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00")))
         .otherwise(F.col("valid_from"))).drop("_rn")

    return intervals.select("currency", "rate", "valid_from", "valid_to", "join_from")

    rate_final = F.when(t["currency"] == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(r["rate"])
    out = (joined
           .withColumn("rate", rate_final)
           .withColumn("amount_usd", t["amount"] * rate_final)
           .select(t["trade_id"], t["currency"], t["amount"],
                   t["trade_ts"], F.col("rate"), F.col("amount_usd")))
    # contract: every emitted trade has a non-null amount_usd
    return out.where(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull())

             "valid_from string, effective_from string, effective_at string, as_of string, "
             "version string, seq string, change_seq string, ingest_seq string, updated_at string")


def _to_utc_ts(col):
    """Branch epoch (sec/millis) vs ISO-8601; never trust a single parser."""
    is_epoch = col.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(col) >= F.lit(13),
                      F.timestamp_millis(col.cast("long"))) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(col.cast("long")))
    return F.when(col.isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")) \
            .when(is_epoch, epoch_ts) \
            .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(col))

@dp.materialized_view(name="trades_parsed")
def trades_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(TRADES_PATH)

    out = (j
           .withColumn("trade_id", F.coalesce(F.col("j.trade_id"), F.col("j.id")))
           .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("j.currency"), F.col("j.ccy"))))
           .withColumn("amount_str", F.coalesce(F.col("j.amount"), F.col("j.notional"), F.col("j.quantity")))
           .withColumn("ts_str", F.coalesce(F.col("j.traded_at"), F.col("j.trade_time"),
                                            F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts")))
           .withColumn("amount_num", F.col("amount_str").cast("double"))
           .withColumn("trade_ts", _to_utc_ts(F.col("ts_str"))))
    valid = (F.col("j").isNotNull() & F.col("trade_id").isNotNull() &
             F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("amount_num").isNotNull() &
             F.col("trade_ts").isNotNull())
    return out.withColumn("_valid", valid).select(
        "value", "trade_id", "currency", "amount_num", "trade_ts", "_valid")

# ---------- fx CDC: collapse corrections -> non-overlapping validity intervals ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rate_dim")
def fx_rate_dim():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(FX_PATH)
    j = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", FX_SCHEMA))
    norm = (j
            .withColumn("currency", F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("j.currency"), F.col("j.ccy"))))
            .withColumn("rate_num", F.coalesce(F.col("j.rate"), F.col("j.fx_rate"), F.col("j.price")).cast("double"))
            .withColumn("valid_from", _to_utc_ts(F.coalesce(
                F.col("j.valid_from"), F.col("j.effective_from"),
                F.col("j.effective_at"), F.col("j.as_of"))))
            .withColumn("seq_num", F.coalesce(
                F.col("j.version"), F.col("j.seq"), F.col("j.change_seq"),
                F.col("j.ingest_seq")).cast("double"))
            .withColumn("upd_ts", _to_utc_ts(F.col("j.updated_at")))
            .where(F.col("currency").isNotNull() &
                   F.col("rate_num").isNotNull() &
                   F.col("valid_from").isNotNull()))

    # collapse multiple corrections for the same (currency, valid_from): keep latest
    dedup_w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "valid_from").orderBy(
        F.col("seq_num").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("upd_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("rate_num").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc())
    latest = (norm.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(dedup_w))
                  .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                  .select("currency", "valid_from", "rate_num"))

    # build consecutive (non-overlapping) intervals per currency
    iw = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy("valid_from")
    intervals = (latest
                 .withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(iw))
                 .withColumn("_idx", F.row_number().over(iw))
                 .withColumn("match_from", F.when(F.col("_idx") == 1,
                                                  F.lit("1900-01-01 00:00:00").cast("timestamp"))
                                            .otherwise(F.col("valid_from")))
                 .select("currency", "valid_from", "valid_to", "match_from", "rate_num"))
    return intervals

            (F.col("r.valid_to").isNull() | (F.col("t.trade_ts") < F.col("r.valid_to"))))
    joined = t.join(r, cond, "left")
    rate_eff = F.coalesce(F.col("r.rate_num"),
                          F.when(F.col("t.currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)))
    valued = (joined
              .withColumn("rate", rate_eff)
              .withColumn("amount_usd", F.col("t.amount_num") * rate_eff)
              .where(F.col("amount_usd").isNotNull()))
    return valued.select(
        F.col("t.trade_id").alias("trade_id"),
        F.col("t.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("t.amount_num").alias("amount"),
        F.col("t.trade_ts").alias("trade_ts"),

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson")

# Type everything as string first; validate/normalize later (never trust one parser).
SCHEMA = ("customer_id string, tier string, region string, "
          "event_time string, updated_at string, ts string, timestamp string, "
          "seq string, version string, op string")

DB = "spark_catalog.default."


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_raw")
def customers_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                       # column: value
    return (raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA))
               .select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"), "j.*"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_clean")
def customers_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(DB + "customers_raw")

    t = F.coalesce(F.col("event_time"), F.col("updated_at"),
                   F.col("ts"), F.col("timestamp"))
    is_epoch = t.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    el = t.cast("long")
    # Normalize to a true instant: epoch-ms (>=13 digits), epoch-s, or ISO-8601.
    event_ts = (F.when(is_epoch & (F.length(t) >= F.lit(13)), F.timestamp_millis(el))
                 .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(el))
                 .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(t)))
    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq").cast("long"), F.col("version").cast("long"))

    d = (df.withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
           .withColumn("seq", seq)
           .where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("tier").isNotNull()
                  & F.col("region").isNotNull()))

    # Deterministic dedup of records sharing the same (customer_id, instant):
    # newest sequence wins, raw text as a stable final tiebreak.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "event_ts").orderBy(
        F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").desc())
    return (d.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
             .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
             .select("customer_id", "tier", "region", "event_ts", "seq"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_history")
def customers_history():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table(DB + "customers_clean")

    wc = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").asc(), F.col("seq").asc_nulls_first())
    prev_tier = F.lag("tier").over(wc)
    prev_region = F.lag("region").over(wc)
    # A new version starts on the first row, or whenever tier/region actually changes.
    is_change = (prev_tier.isNull()
                 | ~prev_tier.eqNullSafe(F.col("tier"))
                 | ~prev_region.eqNullSafe(F.col("region")))

    g = (df.withColumn("_chg", is_change.cast("int"))
           .withColumn("grp", F.sum(F.col("_chg")).over(wc)))

    # Collapse consecutive identical states into one validity period.
    agg = g.groupBy("customer_id", "grp").agg(
        F.min("event_ts").alias("valid_from"),
        F.first("tier").alias("tier"),
        F.first("region").alias("region"))

    wv = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(F.col("valid_from").asc())
    return (agg.withColumn("valid_to", F.lead("valid_from").over(wv))
               .withColumn("is_current", F.col("valid_to").isNull())
               .select("customer_id", "tier", "region",
                       "valid_from", "valid_to", "is_current"))

    h = spark.read.table(DB + "customers_history")
    return (h.where(F.col("is_current"))

def _norm(df):
    g = lambda p: F.get_json_object(F.col("value"), p)
    customer_id = F.coalesce(
        g("$.customer_id"), g("$.id"), g("$.cust_id"), g("$.customerId")
    )
    tier = F.coalesce(g("$.tier"), g("$.customer_tier"), g("$.new_tier"))
    region = F.coalesce(g("$.region"), g("$.customer_region"), g("$.new_region"))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(
        g("$.ts"), g("$.event_ts"), g("$.event_time"), g("$.updated_at"),
        g("$.changed_at"), g("$.timestamp"), g("$.change_ts"),
        g("$.modified_at"), g("$.last_updated"), g("$.valid_from"),
    )
    seq_raw = F.coalesce(
        g("$.seq"), g("$.sequence"), g("$.lsn"), g("$.offset"),
        g("$.version"), g("$._seq"),
    )
    op = F.coalesce(
        g("$.op"), g("$.operation"), g("$._op"), g("$.action"), g("$.change_type")
    )
    # robust timestamp: ISO string first, then epoch-seconds fallback (lazy)
    ts = F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(ts_raw), F.timestamp_seconds(ts_raw.cast("long")))
    return df.select(
        customer_id.alias("customer_id"),
        tier.alias("tier"),
        region.alias("region"),
        ts.alias("ts"),
        seq_raw.cast("long").alias("seq"),
        op.alias("op"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_history")
def customers_history():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(DATA_PATH)
    e = _norm(raw)

    # require a key and a usable timestamp; drop pure-key/empty-state (e.g. delete) rows
    e = e.where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull() & F.col("ts").isNotNull())
    e = e.where(F.col("tier").isNotNull() | F.col("region").isNotNull())

        .withColumn("is_current", F.lead("ts").over(w).isNull())

            F.col("region"),
            F.col("ts").alias("valid_from"),

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson")


# ---- bronze: raw text, one JSON object per line -------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_raw")
def orders_raw():
    return SparkSession.active().read.text(INPUT)


# ---- silver: tolerant parse of both old and new record shapes -----------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="orders_parsed")
def orders_parsed():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_raw")
    g = F.get_json_object

    # Extract every field as a raw JSON string first (no schema-typing traps).
    df = (df
          .withColumn("order_id", g("value", "$.order_id"))
          .withColumn("amount_raw", g("value", "$.amount"))
          .withColumn("et", F.coalesce(
              g("value", "$.event_time"),
              g("value", "$.ts"),
              g("value", "$.timestamp"),
              g("value", "$.created_at"))))

    amt = F.trim(F.col("amount_raw"))
    is_list = amt.startswith("[")
    is_struct_list = is_list & amt.contains("{")

    # newer shape: list of line items as plain numbers -> sum
    list_d = F.from_json(amt, "array<double>")
    sum_d = F.aggregate(list_d, F.lit(0.0),
                        lambda a, b: a + F.coalesce(b, F.lit(0.0)))

    # newer shape: list of line-item objects -> sum amount (or price*qty / price)
    list_s = F.from_json(amt, "array<struct<amount:double,price:double,qty:double>>")
    sum_s = F.aggregate(
        list_s, F.lit(0.0),
        lambda a, b: a + F.coalesce(b["amount"], b["price"] * b["qty"],
                                    b["price"], F.lit(0.0)))

    # older shape: single scalar number; missing -> sensible default 0.0
    amount = (F.when(amt.isNull(), F.lit(0.0))
               .when(is_struct_list, sum_s)
               .when(is_list, sum_d)
               .otherwise(F.coalesce(amt.cast("double"), F.lit(0.0))))

    # ---- UTC calendar day, derived from the epoch INSTANT (tz-independent) ----
    is_epoch = F.col("et").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = F.col("et").cast("long")
    # 13+ digits => milliseconds, else seconds
    epoch_secs = F.when(F.length(F.col("et")) >= 13, epoch_long / 1000.0) \
                  .otherwise(epoch_long.cast("double"))
    # to_timestamp parses ISO-8601 (incl. Z / offset) to an instant;
    # casting that instant to long gives true UTC epoch seconds (no session tz).
    iso_secs = F.to_timestamp(F.col("et")).cast("long").cast("double")

    event_epoch_s = F.when(is_epoch, epoch_secs).otherwise(iso_secs)
    day_num = F.floor(event_epoch_s / 86400.0).cast("int")
    event_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), day_num)

    return df.select(
        event_date.alias("event_date"),
        amount.cast("double").alias("amount"))


# ---- gold: revenue per UTC day, complete across the format change -------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.orders_parsed")
    return (df.groupBy("event_date")
              .agg(F.sum(F.coalesce(F.col("amount"), F.lit(0.0))).alias("revenue")))

def _g(path):

@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)  # batch relation -> materialized_view

    ts_raw = F.coalesce(
        _g("$.ts"), _g("$.event_time"), _g("$.timestamp"),

        _g("$.event_date"), _g("$.date"),
    )
    amount_raw = _g("$.amount")

    df = raw.withColumn("ts_raw", ts_raw).withColumn("amount_raw", amount_raw)

    # ---- UTC calendar day, tz-independent (no session conf mutation) ----
    is_epoch = F.col("ts_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$")
    epoch_num = F.col("ts_raw").cast("double")
    # disambiguate seconds vs millis by magnitude
    epoch_sec = F.when(epoch_num >= F.lit(1e11), epoch_num / F.lit(1000.0)).otherwise(epoch_num)
    df = df.withColumn("epoch_sec", epoch_sec)

    # pure integer-day arithmetic from the UTC epoch -> exact UTC day
    date_epoch = F.expr("date_add(DATE'1970-01-01', cast(floor(epoch_sec/86400) as int))")
    # ISO timestamps: the literal yyyy-MM-dd prefix is the written (UTC) calendar day
    date_iso = F.to_date(F.substring(F.col("ts_raw"), 1, 10))

    event_date = F.when(is_epoch, date_epoch).otherwise(date_iso)

    # ---- revenue tolerant of scalar OR list-of-line-items OR missing ----
    is_arr = F.col("amount_raw").startswith("[")
    arr = F.from_json(F.col("amount_raw"), "array<double>")
    arr_sum = F.aggregate(arr, F.lit(0.0), lambda acc, x: acc + F.coalesce(x, F.lit(0.0)))
    scalar = F.col("amount_raw").cast("double")

    revenue = (
        F.when(F.col("amount_raw").isNull(), F.lit(0.0))        # missing -> default 0
         .when(is_arr, F.coalesce(arr_sum, F.lit(0.0)))         # list -> sum of line items
         .otherwise(F.coalesce(scalar, F.lit(0.0)))             # scalar number
    )

    out = (
        df.withColumn("event_date", event_date)
          .withColumn("rev", revenue)
          .groupBy("event_date")
          .agg(F.sum("rev").alias("revenue"))
    )
    return out.select("event_date", "revenue")

    v = F.col("value")

    # ---- amount: tolerate scalar number OR list of line items ----
    amt = F.get_json_object(v, "$.amount")

    # 1) single number (older shape)
    scalar = amt.cast("double")

    # 2) list of plain numbers
    arr_num = F.from_json(amt, "array<double>")
    sum_num = F.aggregate(
        arr_num, F.lit(0.0), lambda acc, x: acc + F.coalesce(x, F.lit(0.0))
    )

    # 3) list of line-item objects (try common numeric field names)
    arr_obj = F.from_json(
        amt,
        "array<struct<amount:double,total:double,line_total:double,value:double,"
        "price:double,unit_price:double,qty:double,quantity:double>>",
    )
    sum_obj = F.aggregate(
        arr_obj,
        F.lit(0.0),
        lambda acc, x: acc
        + F.coalesce(
            x["amount"],
            x["total"],
            x["line_total"],
            x["value"],
            F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"])
            * F.coalesce(x["qty"], x["quantity"], F.lit(1.0)),
            F.coalesce(x["price"], x["unit_price"]),
            F.lit(0.0),
        ),
    )

    revenue = F.coalesce(
        scalar,
        F.when(F.coalesce(sum_obj, F.lit(0.0)) != F.lit(0.0), sum_obj),
        sum_num,
        F.lit(0.0),  # missing amount -> sensible default 0
    ).cast("double")

    # ---- event_date: derive UTC calendar day from whatever field exists ----
    ds = F.coalesce(
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.event_date"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.order_date"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.date"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.ts"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.timestamp"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.event_time"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.created_at"),
        F.get_json_object(v, "$.order_ts"),
    )

    is_num = ds.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch = ds.cast("double")
    # normalize millis -> seconds, then floor to whole seconds
    secs = F.floor(
        F.when(epoch > F.lit(1.0e12), epoch / F.lit(1000.0)).otherwise(epoch)
    )
    # pure-UTC day math: days since 1970-01-01, no timezone/config involved
    date_epoch = F.when(
        is_num,
        F.date_add(
            F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")),
            F.floor(secs / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int"),
        ),
    )
    date_str = F.to_date(ds)  # handles 'YYYY-MM-DD' and ISO timestamps

    event_date = F.coalesce(
        date_epoch,
        date_str,
        F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")),  # missing date -> sensible default
    ).cast("date")

    return (
        df.select(event_date.alias("event_date"), revenue.alias("revenue"))
        .groupBy("event_date")
        .agg(F.sum("revenue").cast("double").alias("revenue"))
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_messy_orders_seed1337.ndjson")

# Type everything as STRING first; validate then cast (so bad values are
# observable, not silently nulled by the JSON parser).
SCHEMA = ("order_id string, id string, amount string, category string, "
          "event_time string, ts string, timestamp string")


@dp.materialized_view(name="scored")
def scored():
    """Parse + score every source line; nothing is dropped here."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                      # column: value
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA))

    df = df.withColumn("order_id",
                       F.coalesce(F.col("j.order_id"), F.col("j.id")))
    df = df.withColumn("category", F.col("j.category"))
    df = df.withColumn("amount", F.col("j.amount").cast("double"))

    et = F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.timestamp"))
    df = df.withColumn("event_time_raw", et)

    is_epoch = F.col("event_time_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_secs = (F.when(F.length(F.col("event_time_raw")) >= F.lit(13),
                         F.col("event_time_raw").cast("double") / F.lit(1000.0))
                   .otherwise(F.col("event_time_raw").cast("double")))
    # to_timestamp on an ISO string with offset/Z yields a true instant;
    # unix_timestamp gives UTC epoch seconds, independent of session tz.
    iso_secs = F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("event_time_raw"))).cast("double")

    df = df.withColumn("unix_secs", F.when(is_epoch, epoch_secs).otherwise(iso_secs))
    # UTC calendar day via pure integer day arithmetic — no session-tz dependence.
    df = df.withColumn(
        "event_date",
        F.expr("date_from_unix_date(cast(floor(unix_secs / 86400) as int))"))

    reason = (F.when(F.col("j").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
                .when(F.col("order_id").isNull()
                      | (F.trim(F.col("order_id")) == F.lit("")),
                      F.lit("missing_order_id"))
                .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
                .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_date"))
                .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))
    df = df.withColumn("reject_reason", reason)

    return df.select("value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
                     "unix_secs", "event_date", "reject_reason")


@dp.materialized_view(name="valid_ranked")
def valid_ranked():
    """Rows passing every expectation, deterministically ranked per order_id."""
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("scored").where(
        F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("unix_secs").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("value").desc())
    return df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_orders")
def clean_orders():
    """Keyed by order_id; one survivor per key."""
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("valid_ranked").where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return df.select("order_id", "amount", "category")


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_daily")
def gold_daily():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("valid_ranked").where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return df.select(
        F.col("event_date"),
        F.col("amount").alias("revenue"),
        F.col("order_id"),
        F.col("amount"),
        F.col("category"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    """Holding area: invalid rows + duplicate (non-survivor) rows, with reason."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    bad = (spark.read.table("scored")
           .where(F.col("reject_reason").isNotNull())
           .select("value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
                   F.col("reject_reason").alias("reason")))
    dups = (spark.read.table("valid_ranked")
            .where(F.col("_rn") > 1)
            .select("value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
                    F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason")))
    return bad.unionByName(dups)


@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    """Proof of no loss: kept + rejected == source count."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("scored").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table("clean_orders").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table("rejected_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    out = src.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
    return out.withColumn(
        "reconciled",
        (F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")) == F.col("source_count"))

              F.col("j")["event_time"], F.col("j")["ts"],

    is_epoch = F.col("event_raw").rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = F.col("event_raw").cast("long")
    iso_secs = F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("event_raw")))
    event_millis = (F.when(is_epoch,
                        F.when(F.length("event_raw") >= F.lit(12), epoch_long)
                         .otherwise(epoch_long * F.lit(1000)))
                     .otherwise(iso_secs * F.lit(1000)))
    df = df.withColumn("event_millis", event_millis)
    # epoch-day arithmetic is timezone-independent -> true UTC calendar day
    day_num = F.floor(F.col("event_millis") / F.lit(86400000)).cast("int")
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", F.date_from_unix_date(day_num))

    # Expectations (do not silently filter — record the reason).
    reason_validity = (
        F.when(F.col("j").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("order_id").isNull() | (F.length(F.trim(F.col("order_id"))) == 0),
               F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_event_time"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    df = df.withColumn("reason_validity", reason_validity)
    df = df.withColumn("is_valid", F.col("reason_validity").isNull())

    # Deterministic dedup on the business key (order_id): newest event wins,
    # tie-broken on raw text. Valid rows are ranked first so invalid rows
    # sharing an id never displace a good survivor.
    w = Window.partitionBy("order_id").orderBy(
        F.col("is_valid").desc(),
        F.col("event_millis").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc())
    df = df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))

    final_reason = (
        F.when(F.col("reason_validity").isNotNull(), F.col("reason_validity"))
         .when(F.col("is_valid") & (F.col("_rn") > 1), F.lit("duplicate_order_id"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    df = df.withColumn("reason", final_reason)

    return df.select(
        "value", "order_id", "amount", "category",
        "event_date", "event_millis", "reason")

                            mc.getItem("price"))

    ts_raw = F.coalesce(mc.getItem("event_date"), mc.getItem("event_ts"),
                        mc.getItem("timestamp"), mc.getItem("ts"),
                        mc.getItem("order_date"), mc.getItem("created_at"))

    df = df.withColumn("order_id",
                       F.expr_or_none if False else
                       F.when(F.trim(order_id_raw) == "", None)
                        .otherwise(F.trim(order_id_raw)))
    df = df.withColumn("amount_raw", amount_raw)
    df = df.withColumn("category",
                       F.when(F.trim(category_raw) == "", None)
                        .otherwise(F.trim(category_raw)))
    df = df.withColumn("ts_raw", ts_raw)

    # numeric clean: strip currency/grouping chars, then try_cast (never throws)
    df = df.withColumn(
        "amount",

    )

    # date: accept plain dates, ISO timestamps, or epoch seconds -> UTC day
    event_date = F.coalesce(
        F.to_date(F.col("ts_raw")),
        F.to_date(F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts_raw"))),
        F.to_date(F.from_unixtime(F.expr("try_cast(ts_raw as long)"))),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("event_date", event_date)

    reason1 = (
        F.when(F.col("m").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("order_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_order_id"))
         .when(F.col("amount").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_amount"))
         .when(F.col("event_date").isNull(), F.lit("invalid_date"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast(StringType()))

# ---- rejected holding area: structural rejects + duplicate-key rejects ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="rejected_orders")
def rejected_orders():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    structural = (spark.read.table(CAT + "parsed_orders")
                  .where(F.col("reason1").isNotNull())
                  .select(F.col("order_id"), F.col("value").alias("raw_record"),
                          F.col("reason1").alias("reason")))
    dups = (spark.read.table(CAT + "valid_ranked")
            .where(F.col("rn") > 1)
            .select(F.col("order_id"), F.col("value").alias("raw_record"),
                    F.lit("duplicate_order_id").alias("reason")))
    return structural.unionByName(dups)


# ---- proof: source_count == kept_count + rejected_count ----
@dp.materialized_view(name="recon_check")
def recon_check():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    total = spark.read.table(CAT + "bronze_lines").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    kept = spark.read.table(CAT + "clean_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("kept_count"))
    rej = spark.read.table(CAT + "rejected_orders").agg(
        F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("rejected_count"))
    return (total.crossJoin(kept).crossJoin(rej)
            .withColumn("reconciled",
                        F.col("source_count") == F.col("kept_count") + F.col("rejected_count")))

# ---- field extraction (flexible across messy upstream key spellings) ----
def _derive(raw):
    g = F.get_json_object
    v = F.col("value")

    cid = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.customer_id"), g(v, "$.id"), g(v, "$.cust_id"),
                     g(v, "$.customerId"))
    op_raw = F.lower(F.coalesce(g(v, "$.op"), g(v, "$.operation"),
                                g(v, "$.change_type"), g(v, "$.action"),
                                g(v, "$.event_type")))
    tier = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.tier"), g(v, "$.customer_tier"))
    region = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.region"), g(v, "$.customer_region"))
    ts = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.event_time"), g(v, "$.ts"), g(v, "$.timestamp"),
                    g(v, "$.event_ts"), g(v, "$.time"), g(v, "$.event_timestamp"))
    seq = F.coalesce(g(v, "$.sequence"), g(v, "$.seq"), g(v, "$.offset"),
                     g(v, "$.lsn"), g(v, "$.version"), g(v, "$._seq"),
                     g(v, "$.commit_seq"))

    # normalize CDC operation to add / change / remove
    op_norm = (F.when(op_raw.isin("i", "insert", "c", "create", "add"), F.lit("add"))
                .when(op_raw.isin("u", "update", "change", "modify", "m"), F.lit("change"))
                .when(op_raw.isin("d", "delete", "remove", "r"), F.lit("remove"))
                .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    # UTC-correct epoch seconds WITHOUT touching session timezone conf.
    is_epoch = ts.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = ts.cast("long")
    epoch_sec = (F.when(~is_epoch, F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(ts)))        # ISO-8601
                  .when(F.length(ts) >= F.lit(13), (epoch_long / F.lit(1000)).cast("long"))  # millis
                  .otherwise(epoch_long))                                       # seconds

    # hour bucket via pure epoch math => independent of any session timezone
    hour_epoch = (F.floor(epoch_sec / F.lit(3600)) * F.lit(3600)).cast("long")
    hour_ts = F.timestamp_seconds(hour_epoch)

    # deterministic sequence key for ordering/dedup
    seq_long = F.coalesce(seq.cast("long"), epoch_sec)

    return raw.select(
        v.alias("value"),
        cid.alias("customer_id"),
        op_norm.alias("op_norm"),
        tier.alias("tier"),
        region.alias("region"),
        epoch_sec.alias("epoch_sec"),
        seq_long.alias("seq_long"),
        hour_ts.alias("hour_ts"),
    )


def _is_valid():
    return (F.col("customer_id").isNotNull()
            & F.col("op_norm").isNotNull()
            & F.col("epoch_sec").isNotNull())


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_quarantine")
def cdc_quarantine():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(PATH)
    return _derive(raw).where(~_is_valid()).select("value")


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_clean")
def cdc_clean():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(PATH)
    d = _derive(raw).where(_is_valid())
    # collapse exact duplicate emissions of the same change (customer_id, seq):
    # keeps reprocessing totals stable (idempotent), tie-broken deterministically.
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "seq_long").orderBy(
        F.col("epoch_sec").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("op_norm").asc())
    return (d.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
             .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
             .drop("_rn"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_clean")
    # latest change per customer, by sequence then event time (deterministic)
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(
        F.col("seq_long").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("epoch_sec").desc_nulls_last())
    latest = (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))
    # a customer whose latest op is a removal is not in current state
    return (latest.where(F.col("op_norm") != F.lit("remove"))
                  .select("customer_id", "tier", "region"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="activity_by_hour_region")
def activity_by_hour_region():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.cdc_clean")
    agg = (df.groupBy("hour_ts", "region").agg(
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "add", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("added"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "change", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("changed"),
        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_norm") == "remove", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),
    ))
    # net = added - removed; summed across hours per region reconciles to
    # customers_current counts, and added+changed+removed reconciles to source.
    return agg.select(
        F.col("hour_ts").alias("hour"),
        "region", "added", "changed", "removed",
        (F.col("added") - F.col("removed")).alias("net_change"),
    )

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = ("file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/"
         "experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/"
         "gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson")

# Type external columns as STRINGS first (validate, then cast) so bad values

SCHEMA = (
    "customer_id string, op string, operation string, change_type string, "
    "event_time string, ts string, timestamp string, event_ts string, "
    "tier string, region string, seq string, sequence string, version string"
)


def _enriched():
    """Parse + normalize. Builds an UNRESOLVED plan only (no actions)."""
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                       # column: value
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), SCHEMA)
    base = (raw.withColumn("j", j)
               .withColumn("_json_ok", F.col("j").isNotNull())
               .select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"), "_json_ok", "j.*"))

    op = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce("op", "operation", "change_type")))
    et = F.coalesce("event_time", "ts", "timestamp", "event_ts")
    seq_raw = F.coalesce("seq", "sequence", "version")

    # UTC normalization without mutating session conf: branch epoch vs ISO.
    is_epoch = et.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    ev_long = et.cast("long")
    event_ts = (F.when(is_epoch & (ev_long > F.lit(99999999999)),
                       F.timestamp_millis(ev_long))            # epoch millis
                  .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(ev_long))  # epoch seconds
                  .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(et)))                # ISO-8601

    op_class = (F.when(op.isin("insert", "i", "add", "c", "create"), F.lit("added"))
                  .when(op.isin("update", "u", "change", "m", "upsert"), F.lit("changed"))
                  .when(op.isin("delete", "d", "remove", "r"), F.lit("removed"))
                  .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    enr = (base
           .withColumn("op_class", op_class)
           .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
           .withColumn("seq_long", seq_raw.cast("long")))

    # Cast-to-long of a timestamp == UTC epoch seconds, independent of session TZ.
    epoch_seconds = F.col("event_ts").cast("long")
    hour_epoch = (F.floor(epoch_seconds / F.lit(3600)) * F.lit(3600)).cast("long")
    enr = enr.withColumn("hour", F.timestamp_seconds(hour_epoch))

    # Expectations: required key, parseable time, recognized op.
    is_clean = (F.col("_json_ok")
                & F.col("customer_id").isNotNull()
                & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
                & F.col("op_class").isNotNull())
    return enr.withColumn("_is_clean", is_clean)


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_clean")
def cdc_clean():
    """Clean CDC changes, deterministically deduped one row per (customer, seq)."""
    enr = _enriched().where(F.col("_is_clean"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("customer_id", "seq_long").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").desc())
    dedup = (enr.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))
    return dedup.select("customer_id", "tier", "region",
                        "op_class", "event_ts", "hour", "seq_long")


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_quarantine")
def cdc_quarantine():
    """Rows that failed parse/expectations — loss stays observable."""
    enr = _enriched().where(~F.col("_is_clean"))
    return enr.select(F.col("_raw").alias("value"))

        F.sum(F.when(F.col("op_class") == "removed", 1).otherwise(0)).alias("removed"),

def _g(*paths):
    # robust extraction across possible upstream field names; fully lazy
    return F.coalesce(*[F.get_json_object(F.col("value"), p) for p in paths])


@dp.materialized_view(name="cdc_events")
def cdc_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    raw = spark.read.text(PATH)

    df = raw.select(
        _g("$.customer_id", "$.id", "$.cust_id", "$.customerId").alias("customer_id"),
        _g("$.tier", "$.customer_tier", "$.new_tier").alias("tier"),
        _g("$.region", "$.customer_region", "$.new_region").alias("region"),
        _g("$.op", "$.operation", "$.change_type", "$._op", "$.action",
           "$.cdc_op", "$.event_type", "$.kind").alias("op"),
        _g("$.ts", "$.timestamp", "$.event_time", "$.event_ts", "$.changed_at",
           "$.time", "$.event_timestamp", "$.updated_at").alias("ts"),
    ).where(F.col("customer_id").isNotNull())

    opl = F.lower(F.trim(F.col("op")))
    category = (
        F.when(opl.isin("i", "ins", "insert", "add", "added", "c", "create", "created"), "added")

         .when(opl.isin("d", "del", "delete", "deleted", "remove", "removed"), "removed")
         .otherwise("changed")
    )

    # parse timestamp: ISO strings first, then epoch millis/seconds
    ts_ts = F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(F.col("ts")),
        F.timestamp_millis(F.col("ts").cast("long")),
        F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("ts").cast("long")),
    )

    out = (
        df.withColumn("category", category)
          .withColumn("event_ts", ts_ts)
          .withColumn("hour", F.date_format(F.date_trunc("hour", ts_ts), "yyyy-MM-dd HH:00:00"))
          # idempotency: collapse duplicate CDC emissions so totals are stable
          .dropDuplicates(["customer_id", "ts", "op"])
    )
    return out

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

DATA_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"

# Type EVERY external column as string first; validate, then cast (spark-safety §4).
SCHEMA = (
    "event_id string, id string, txn_id string, settlement_id string, "
    "amount string, native_amount string, settled_value string, "
    "usd_amount string, usd_value string, usd_total string, settled_usd string, "
    "currency string, ccy string, "
    "rate string, fx_rate string, rate_to_usd string, usd_rate string, "
    "event_time string, timestamp string, ts string, "
    "settlement_date string, date string, "
    "source string, feed string, type string"
)


def _enrich(df):
    """Pure plan-building (no actions): normalize, derive UTC day, value in USD."""
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_id",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.event_id"), F.col("j.id"), F.col("j.txn_id"),
            F.col("j.settlement_id"), F.sha2(F.col("_raw"), 256),
        ),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("_currency", F.upper(F.coalesce(F.col("j.currency"), F.col("j.ccy"))))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_native",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.amount").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.native_amount").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.settled_value").cast("double"),
        ),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_rate",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.rate").cast("double"), F.col("j.fx_rate").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.rate_to_usd").cast("double"), F.col("j.usd_rate").cast("double"),
        ),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_usd_direct",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.usd_amount").cast("double"), F.col("j.usd_value").cast("double"),
            F.col("j.usd_total").cast("double"), F.col("j.settled_usd").cast("double"),
        ),
    )
    # UTC event-time normalization handling BOTH epoch and ISO forms (spark-safety §3).
    df = df.withColumn("_et", F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts")))
    df = df.withColumn("_is_epoch", F.col("_et").rlike("^[0-9]+$"))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_epoch_seconds",
        F.when(F.col("_is_epoch") & (F.length("_et") >= F.lit(13)),
               F.col("_et").cast("long") / F.lit(1000.0))
         .when(F.col("_is_epoch"), F.col("_et").cast("long").cast("double"))
         .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col("_et"))).cast("double")),
    )
    # UTC calendar day via pure epoch arithmetic -> independent of session timezone,
    # so we never need to mutate spark.sql.session.timeZone (gate-blocked).
    df = df.withColumn("_utc_day", F.floor(F.col("_epoch_seconds") / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int"))
    df = df.withColumn("_date_from_ts", F.expr("date_add(DATE '1970-01-01', _utc_day)"))
    df = df.withColumn("_date_str", F.coalesce(F.col("j.settlement_date"), F.col("j.date")))
    df = df.withColumn("settlement_date", F.coalesce(F.to_date(F.col("_date_str")), F.col("_date_from_ts")))

    df = df.withColumn("usd_value", F.coalesce(F.col("_usd_direct"), F.col("_native") * F.col("_rate")))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "is_external",
        F.coalesce(
            F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("j.source"), F.col("j.feed"), F.col("j.type")))
             .rlike("bank|external|settle"),
            F.lit(False),
        ),
    )
    # Expectations: date + currency + a derivable USD value are required.
    df = df.withColumn(
        "_valid",
        F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("_currency").isNotNull()
        & F.col("usd_value").isNotNull(),
    )
    return df


@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed")
def parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(DATA_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"))
    return raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("_raw"), SCHEMA))


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_quarantine")
def settlement_quarantine():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed")
    enriched = _enrich(src.where(F.col("j").isNotNull()))
    bad_json = src.where(F.col("j").isNull()).select("_raw")
    bad_rows = enriched.where(~F.col("_valid")).select("_raw")
    return bad_json.unionByName(bad_rows)


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_events")
def clean_events():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.parsed")
    enriched = _enrich(src.where(F.col("j").isNotNull())).where(F.col("_valid"))
    # Deterministic dedup on a real sequence key (spark-safety §2).
    w = Window.partitionBy("_id", "is_external").orderBy(
        F.col("_epoch_seconds").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_raw").desc()
    )
    deduped = enriched.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return deduped.select(
        F.col("settlement_date"),
        F.col("_currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("usd_value"),
        F.col("is_external"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    ce = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_events")
    return (
        ce.where(~F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_currency_daily")
def settlement_currency_daily():
    ce = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_events")
    return (
        ce.where(~F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    ce = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.clean_events")
    internal = (
        ce.where(~F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("internal_usd"))
    )
    external = (
        ce.where(F.col("is_external"))
          .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
          .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("external_usd"))
    )
    recon = internal.join(external, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    recon = recon.withColumn(
        "usd_diff",
        F.round(
            F.coalesce(F.col("internal_usd"), F.lit(0.0))
            - F.coalesce(F.col("external_usd"), F.lit(0.0)),
            2,
        ),
    )
    recon = recon.withColumn(
        "status",
        F.when(F.col("internal_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_INTERNAL"))
         .when(F.col("external_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_EXTERNAL"))
         .when(F.abs(F.col("usd_diff")) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH")),
    )
    return recon.select(
        "settlement_date", "currency", "internal_usd", "external_usd", "usd_diff", "status"
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

INPUT = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"

# Type EVERYTHING as STRING first, then validate+cast (spark-safety #4):
# typing numerics/timestamps in the schema turns bad values into silent nulls.
SCHEMA = (
    "event_id STRING, txn_id STRING, event_time STRING, currency STRING, "
    "amount STRING, fx_rate STRING, rate STRING, usd_amount STRING, "
    "source STRING, feed STRING"
)


def _utc_event_date(col):
    """UTC calendar day, computed WITHOUT relying on session timezone.

    - epoch (all digits): treat as ms-since-UTC-epoch -> day via integer division.
    - ISO-8601 (assumed UTC / 'Z'): the leading 10 chars are the UTC date.
    """
    is_epoch = col.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    days = (col.cast("long") / F.lit(86400000)).cast("long")  # floor for >=0
    epoch_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), days.cast("int"))
    iso_date = F.to_date(F.substring(col, 1, 10))
    return F.when(is_epoch, epoch_date).otherwise(iso_date)


def _parsed(spark):
    raw = spark.read.text(INPUT)                       # column: value
    return raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", SCHEMA))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Quarantine: rows that fail to parse or violate validity expectations.
# rows_in == clean + quarantined ; nothing is lost without a trace.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_quarantine")
def settlement_quarantine():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = _parsed(spark)
    j = F.col("j")
    bad_parse = j.isNull()
    event_date = _utc_event_date(j["event_time"])
    amount = j["amount"].cast("double")
    currency = F.upper(j["currency"])
    bad = (
        bad_parse
        | event_date.isNull()
        | amount.isNull()
        | currency.isNull()
    )
    return p.where(bad).select("value")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Clean, deduplicated facts (deterministic survivor per business key).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_clean")
def settlement_clean():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = _parsed(spark)
    j = F.col("j")

    df = p.select(
        j["event_id"].alias("event_id"),
        j["txn_id"].alias("txn_id"),
        j["event_time"].alias("event_time"),
        F.upper(j["currency"]).alias("currency"),
        j["amount"].cast("double").alias("amount"),
        F.coalesce(j["fx_rate"], j["rate"]).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        j["usd_amount"].cast("double").alias("usd_amount"),
        F.lower(F.coalesce(j["source"], j["feed"], F.lit(""))).alias("source"),
        F.col("value"),
    ).withColumn("settlement_date", _utc_event_date(F.col("event_time")))

    # Expectations: keep only fully-valid rows (failures went to quarantine).
    valid = df.where(
        F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
        & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
        & F.col("amount").isNotNull()
    )

    # USD conversion at the rate effective that day; USD passes through at 1.0.
    rate_eff = F.when(F.col("currency") == "USD", F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("rate"))
    valid = valid.withColumn(
        "usd_value",
        F.coalesce(F.col("usd_amount"), F.col("amount") * rate_eff),
    ).withColumn("is_bank", (F.col("source") == "bank"))

    # Deterministic dedup on explicit business key + event-time ordering.
    bkey = F.coalesce(F.col("event_id"), F.col("txn_id"), F.col("value"))
    w = Window.partitionBy(bkey).orderBy(
        F.col("event_time").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("value").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    return (
        valid.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
        .drop("_rn")
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CONTRACT: settlement_daily(settlement_date DATE [UTC day], usd_total)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_daily")
def settlement_daily():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_clean")
    ours = src.where(~F.col("is_bank") & F.col("usd_value").isNotNull())
    return (
        ours.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"))
        .select(F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"), "usd_total")
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-currency breakdown (native + USD), per UTC day.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_by_currency")
def settlement_by_currency():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_clean")
    ours = src.where(~F.col("is_bank"))
    return (
        ours.groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(
            F.round(F.sum("amount"), 2).alias("native_total"),
            F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("usd_total"),
        )
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
            "currency",
            "native_total",
            "usd_total",
        )
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Reconciliation against the external (bank) settlements feed, line by line.
# Full-outer join surfaces both off-by amounts AND currencies missing on a side.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="settlement_reconciliation")
def settlement_reconciliation():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table("spark_catalog.default.settlement_clean")

    ours = (
        src.where(~F.col("is_bank"))
        .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("our_usd"))
    )
    bank = (
        src.where(F.col("is_bank"))
        .groupBy("settlement_date", "currency")
        .agg(F.round(F.sum("usd_value"), 2).alias("bank_usd"))
    )

    j = ours.join(bank, ["settlement_date", "currency"], "full_outer")
    diff = F.round(
        F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd"), F.lit(0.0)) - F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd"), F.lit(0.0)),
        2,
    )
    status = (
        F.when(F.col("our_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_INTERNAL"))
        .when(F.col("bank_usd").isNull(), F.lit("MISSING_BANK"))
        .when(F.abs(diff) < F.lit(0.01), F.lit("MATCH"))
        .otherwise(F.lit("MISMATCH"))
    )
    return j.select(
        F.col("settlement_date").cast("date"),
        "currency",
        F.coalesce(F.col("our_usd"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("our_usd"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("bank_usd"), F.lit(0.0)).alias("bank_usd"),
        diff.alias("usd_diff"),
        status.alias("recon_status"),
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window

CLICK = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_clickstream_seed1337.ndjson"
CDC = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

CLICK_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, userId string, uid string, "
    "event_id string, eventId string, id string, "
    "event_type string, event string, stage string, action string, type string, "
    "event_time string, timestamp string, ts string, time string"
)

CDC_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, customer_id string, id string, uid string, "
    "name string, customer_name string, full_name string, "
    "country string, region string, tier string, segment string, plan string, "
    "updated_at string, updated_ts string, timestamp string, ts string, "
    "op string, operation string"
)


def to_ts(colname):
    """Deterministic UTC-stable parse: epoch (s/ms) or ISO-8601. No session-conf mutation."""
    s = F.col(colname)
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    return (
        F.when(is_epoch & (F.length(s) >= 12), F.timestamp_millis(s.cast("long")))
        .when(is_epoch, F.timestamp_seconds(s.cast("long")))
        .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(s))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_parsed")
def silver_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(CLICK)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), CLICK_SCHEMA))
    df = df.select(
        F.col("value"),
        F.col("j").isNotNull().alias("parse_ok"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.user_id"), F.col("j.userId"), F.col("j.uid")).alias("user_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_id"), F.col("j.eventId"), F.col("j.id")).alias("event_id"),
        F.lower(
            F.trim(
                F.coalesce(
                    F.col("j.event_type"), F.col("j.event"), F.col("j.stage"),
                    F.col("j.action"), F.col("j.type"),
                )
            )
        ).alias("stage"),
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("j.event_time"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.time")
        ).alias("event_time_raw"),
    )
    df = df.withColumn("event_ts", to_ts("event_time_raw"))
    valid_stage = F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase")
    is_clean = (
        F.col("parse_ok")
        & F.col("user_id").isNotNull()
        & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
        & valid_stage
    )
    return df.withColumn("is_clean", is_clean)


@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    df = SparkSession.active().read.table("silver_parsed")
    return df.where(~F.col("is_clean")).select("value")


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_customers_current")
def dim_customers_current():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(CDC)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), CDC_SCHEMA))
    df = df.where(F.col("j").isNotNull()).select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.user_id"), F.col("j.customer_id"), F.col("j.id"), F.col("j.uid")).alias("cust_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.name"), F.col("j.customer_name"), F.col("j.full_name")).alias("cust_name"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.country"), F.col("j.region")).alias("cust_country"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.tier"), F.col("j.segment"), F.col("j.plan")).alias("cust_tier"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.updated_at"), F.col("j.updated_ts"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.ts")).alias("updated_raw"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.op"), F.col("j.operation")).alias("op"),
        F.col("value"),
    )
    df = df.where(F.col("cust_id").isNotNull()).withColumn("updated_ts", to_ts("updated_raw"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("cust_id").orderBy(
        F.col("updated_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("value").desc()
    )

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Inputs (this seed)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
CLICKS_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_clickstream_seed2718.ndjson"
CDC_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Read every external field as a STRING first (validate, then cast) so a bad
# value becomes an observable quarantine row rather than a silent null.
CLICK_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, user string, uid string, "
    "event_time string, event_ts string, ts string, timestamp string, time string, "
    "event_type string, stage string, event string, action string, type string, "
    "event_id string, id string"
)

CDC_SCHEMA = (
    "user_id string, user string, uid string, "
    "name string, email string, country string, region string, "
    "plan string, segment string, "
    "updated_at string, ts string, timestamp string, seq string, _seq string, op string"
)

CATALOG = "spark_catalog.default"
GAP_SECONDS = 30 * 60
STAGES = ["view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"]


def parse_ts(col):
    """UTC-correct normalization of a mixed epoch / ISO event-time string.

    Epoch is read as a numeric string and converted to a UTC instant
    (millis vs seconds detected by digit length); ISO-8601 falls through
    to to_timestamp. We avoid mutating any session conf (not allowed in a
    declarative pipeline) by deriving instants directly.
    """
    is_epoch = col.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    epoch_long = col.cast("long")
    ts_epoch = F.when(F.length(col) >= F.lit(12), F.timestamp_millis(epoch_long)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(epoch_long))
    return (
        F.when(col.isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
         .when(is_epoch, ts_epoch)
         .otherwise(F.to_timestamp(col))
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bronze: parse raw clickstream text, keep original line for reconciliation
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks")
def bronze_clicks():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(CLICKS_PATH)
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), CLICK_SCHEMA)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", j)
    user_id = F.coalesce(j["user_id"], j["user"], j["uid"])
    et_raw = F.coalesce(j["event_time"], j["event_ts"], j["ts"], j["timestamp"], j["time"])
    stage = F.lower(F.coalesce(j["event_type"], j["stage"], j["event"], j["action"], j["type"]))
    event_id = F.coalesce(j["event_id"], j["id"])
    return df.select(
        F.col("value"),
        F.col("j"),
        user_id.alias("user_id"),
        et_raw.alias("event_time_raw"),
        stage.alias("stage"),
        event_id.alias("event_id"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Holding area: unparseable / contract-violating rows (observable loss)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="clicks_quarantine")
def clicks_quarantine():
    src = SparkSession.active().read.table(f"{CATALOG}.bronze_clicks")
    ts = parse_ts(F.col("event_time_raw"))
    bad = F.col("j").isNull() | F.col("user_id").isNull() | ts.isNull()
    return src.where(bad).select(F.col("value"))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Current customer profile (CDC -> latest version per user, deterministic)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CDC_PATH)
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), CDC_SCHEMA)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", j).where(F.col("j").isNotNull())
    user_id = F.coalesce(j["user_id"], j["user"], j["uid"])
    seq_raw = F.coalesce(j["updated_at"], j["ts"], j["timestamp"], j["seq"], j["_seq"])
    ts = parse_ts(seq_raw)
    flat = df.select(
        user_id.alias("user_id"),
        ts.alias("_ts"),
        seq_raw.alias("_seq_raw"),
        j["name"].alias("name"),
        F.coalesce(j["country"], j["region"]).alias("country"),
        F.coalesce(j["plan"], j["segment"]).alias("plan"),
    ).where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("_seq_raw").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    cur = flat.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return cur.select("user_id", "name", "country", "plan")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Silver: clean events assigned to a visit (30-min inactivity gap) + enriched.
# Batch read => late events are naturally included; reprocessing is stable.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table(f"{CATALOG}.bronze_clicks")
    ts = parse_ts(F.col("event_time_raw"))
    clean = (
        src.where(F.col("j").isNotNull() & F.col("user_id").isNotNull() & ts.isNotNull())
           .withColumn("event_ts", ts)
           .withColumn("event_unix", F.unix_timestamp(ts))
    )

    order_w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_unix")
    prev = F.lag("event_unix").over(order_w)
    new_sess = F.when(prev.isNull() | ((F.col("event_unix") - prev) > F.lit(GAP_SECONDS)), 1).otherwise(0)
    run_w = (Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_unix")
                   .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow))
    clean = (
        clean.withColumn("_new", new_sess)
             .withColumn("visit_index", F.sum("_new").over(run_w))
             .withColumn("visit_id", F.concat(F.col("user_id"), F.lit("#v"), F.col("visit_index")))
    )

    prof = spark.read.table(f"{CATALOG}.customers_current")
    enriched = clean.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")
    return enriched.select(
        "user_id",
        "visit_id",
        "event_ts",
        "stage",
        "event_id",
        "name",
        "country",
        "plan",
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gold: distinct-user funnel per stage
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = spark.read.table(f"{CATALOG}.silver_sessions")
    valid = s.where(F.col("stage").isin(STAGES))
    return valid.groupBy("stage").agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))

# Permissive, field-name-tolerant schemas (parse each line as JSON; unknown -> null).
CLICK_FIELDS = [
    "user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id",
    "event_id", "id", "click_id",
    "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "time", "event_ts",

]
CLICK_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(f, StringType(), True) for f in CLICK_FIELDS])

CDC_FIELDS = [
    "customer_id", "user_id", "uid", "id",
    "name", "full_name", "first_name", "last_name",

]
CDC_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(f, StringType(), True) for f in CDC_FIELDS])


def _parse_ts(col):
    """Parse ISO timestamps OR epoch (seconds / millis) defensively."""
    d = col.cast("double")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(col),
        F.when(d > F.lit(1e12), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(d / F.lit(1000.0)))),
        F.when(d > F.lit(1e9), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(d))),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks")
def bronze_clicks():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    # One row per source line => exact source count, nothing dropped.
    raw = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
    p = F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), CLICK_SCHEMA)

    user_id = F.coalesce(p["user_id"], p["userId"], p["uid"], p["user"], p["customer_id"])
    event_id = F.coalesce(p["event_id"], p["id"], p["click_id"])
    raw_ts = F.coalesce(p["ts"], p["timestamp"], p["event_time"], p["time"], p["event_ts"])
    raw_stage = F.coalesce(p["event"], p["event_type"], p["stage"], p["action"], p["type"])
    event_ts = _parse_ts(raw_ts)

    s = F.lower(raw_stage)
    stage = (
        F.when(s.contains("view"), F.lit("view"))
        .when(s.contains("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
        .when(s.contains("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
        .when(s.contains("purchase") | s.contains("buy") | s.contains("order"), F.lit("purchase"))
        .otherwise(s)
    )

    df = raw.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        user_id.alias("user_id"),
        event_id.alias("event_id"),
        raw_ts.alias("raw_ts"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        raw_stage.alias("raw_stage"),
        stage.alias("stage"),
    )
    # Valid = parsed AND has the minimum keys needed to place the click.
    return df.withColumn(
        "is_valid", F.col("user_id").isNotNull() & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("p_user").orderBy(

    )
