@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    clean = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks").where(F.col("is_valid"))

    # Sessionize by EVENT time so late-arriving clicks land in the right visit.
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("event_ts").asc())
    df = clean.withColumn("prev_ts", F.lag("event_ts").over(w))
    gap = F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - F.col("prev_ts").cast("long")
    df = df.withColumn(
        "new_session",
        F.when(F.col("prev_ts").isNull() | (gap > F.lit(1800)), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)),
    )
    wc = (
        Window.partitionBy("user_id")
        .orderBy(F.col("event_ts").asc())
        .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    )
    df = df.withColumn("session_num", F.sum("new_session").over(wc))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "visit_id", F.concat_ws("-", F.col("user_id"), F.col("session_num").cast("string"))
    )

    # Enrich with the user's current profile.
    cdc = spark.read.table("cdc_current")
    j = df.join(cdc, df["user_id"] == cdc["p_user"], "left")
    return j.select(
        F.col("user_id"),
        F.col("event_id"),
        F.col("event_ts"),
        F.col("stage"),
        F.col("raw_stage"),
        F.col("visit_id"),
        F.col("session_num"),
        F.col("profile_name"),
        F.col("profile_email"),
        F.col("profile_country"),
        F.col("profile_tier"),
        F.col("raw_line"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = spark.read.table("silver_sessions")

    counts = (
        s.where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
        .groupBy("stage")
        .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
    )
    # Guarantee all four stages appear, even with zero users.
    base = spark.range(4).withColumn(
        "stage",
        F.element_at(
            F.array(F.lit("view"), F.lit("cart"), F.lit("checkout"), F.lit("purchase")),
            (F.col("id") + F.lit(1)).cast("int"),
        ),
    )
    out = (
        base.select("stage")
        .join(counts, "stage", "left")
        .withColumn("users", F.coalesce(F.col("users"), F.lit(0)).cast("long"))
    )
    return out.select("stage", "users")

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_clickstream_seed2718.ndjson"
CUST_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s3/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

MAP = MapType(StringType(), StringType())


def _pick(mcol, keys):
    return F.coalesce(*[mcol.getItem(k) for k in keys])


def _to_ts(ts_str):
    # numeric epoch (sec or ms) OR ISO/string timestamp
    is_num = ts_str.rlike(r"^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$")
    intpart = F.regexp_replace(ts_str, r"\..*$", "")
    epoch = ts_str.cast("double")
    secs = F.when(F.length(intpart) >= 13, epoch / 1000.0).otherwise(epoch)
    ts_from_epoch = F.timestamp_seconds(secs)
    ts_iso = F.to_timestamp(ts_str)
    return F.when(is_num, ts_from_epoch).otherwise(ts_iso)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Parse the clickstream. Every text line becomes exactly one row so that
#    valid + held always reconcile to the source line count.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="clicks_parsed")
def clicks_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))
    m = F.from_json(F.col("raw"), MAP)

    user_id = _pick(m, ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user",
                        "customer_id", "customerId", "custId"])
    ts_str = _pick(m, ["timestamp", "ts", "event_time", "eventTime", "time",
                       "event_timestamp", "created_at", "occurred_at"])
    stage_raw = _pick(m, ["event", "event_type", "eventType", "stage",
                          "type", "action"])

    event_ts = _to_ts(ts_str)
    sn = F.lower(F.trim(stage_raw))
    stage = (F.when(sn.rlike("view"), F.lit("view"))
              .when(sn.rlike("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
              .when(sn.rlike("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
              .when(sn.rlike("purchase|buy|order"), F.lit("purchase")))

    df = (raw
          .withColumn("m", m)
          .withColumn("user_id", user_id)
          .withColumn("ts_str", ts_str)
          .withColumn("stage_raw", stage_raw)
          .withColumn("event_ts", event_ts)
          .withColumn("stage", stage))

    # A click is usable iff JSON parsed AND we can place it (user + time).
    is_valid = (F.col("m").isNotNull()
                & F.col("user_id").isNotNull()
                & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull())
    return df.withColumn("is_valid", is_valid)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Current profile per user from the CDC feed (latest, non-deleted record).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CUST_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))
    m = F.from_json(F.col("raw"), MAP)

    cust_id = _pick(m, ["customer_id", "user_id", "userId", "id", "custId", "uid"])
    op = F.lower(F.trim(_pick(m, ["op", "operation", "_change_type",
                                  "change_type", "_op"])))
    ord_str = _pick(m, ["version", "seq", "sequence", "lsn", "_commit_ts",
                        "updated_at", "modified_at", "ts", "timestamp"])
    is_num = ord_str.rlike(r"^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$")
    order_key = F.when(is_num, ord_str.cast("double")).otherwise(
        _to_ts(ord_str).cast("double"))

    df = (raw
          .withColumn("cust_id", cust_id)
          .withColumn("op", op)
          .withColumn("order_key", order_key)
          .withColumn("p_country", _pick(m, ["country", "region", "geo"]))
          .withColumn("p_plan", _pick(m, ["plan", "tier", "plan_name", "subscription"]))
          .withColumn("p_name", _pick(m, ["name", "full_name", "fullName", "username"]))
          .withColumn("p_email", _pick(m, ["email", "email_address"]))
          .where(F.col("cust_id").isNotNull()))

    w = Window.partitionBy("cust_id").orderBy(
        F.col("order_key").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("raw").desc())
    latest = (df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
                .where(~F.col("op").isin("d", "delete", "del", "remove", "_delete")))

    return latest.select(
        F.col("cust_id").alias("user_id"),
        "p_country", "p_plan", "p_name", "p_email")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. silver_sessions: every clean event assigned to a visit (30-min gap rule),
#    enriched with current profile. Batch => no late events dropped.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = (spark.read.table("clicks_parsed")
          .where(F.col("is_valid"))
          .withColumn("event_ts_long", F.col("event_ts").cast("long")))

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_ts_long").asc(), F.col("raw").asc())
    prev = F.lag("event_ts_long").over(w)
    new_visit = F.when(prev.isNull() | ((F.col("event_ts_long") - prev) > 1800),
                       F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))
    wc = w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    visit_num = F.sum(new_visit).over(wc)

    sessioned = (ev
                 .withColumn("visit_num", visit_num)
                 .withColumn("visit_id",
                             F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"),
                                         F.col("visit_num").cast("string"))))

    prof = spark.read.table("customers_current")
    enriched = sessioned.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")

    return enriched.select(
        "user_id", "visit_id", "event_ts", "stage",
        F.col("stage_raw").alias("event_type_raw"),
        F.col("p_country").alias("profile_country"),
        F.col("p_plan").alias("profile_plan"),
        F.col("p_name").alias("profile_name"),
        F.col("p_email").alias("profile_email"),
        "raw")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Holding area for anything we could not parse/place.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    bad = spark.read.table("clicks_parsed").where(~F.col("is_valid"))
    reason = (F.when(F.col("m").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
               .when(F.col("user_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_user_id"))
               .when(F.col("event_ts").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_timestamp"))
               .otherwise(F.lit("unknown")))
    return bad.select("raw", reason.alias("hold_reason"))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. gold_funnel: distinct users that reached each stage.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = (spark.read.table("silver_sessions")
         .where(F.col("stage").isNotNull()))
    return (s.groupBy("stage")
             .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
             .select("stage", "users"))

def silver_orders():

    df = spark.read.table("orders_raw")

    cleaned = (
        df.where(F.col("order_id").isNotNull())

              F.col("amount").cast("double").alias("amount"),
              F.col("category").cast("string").alias("category"),
          )
    )

    # Collapse all replayed copies of an order_id into ONE row.
    # max(struct(...)) is order-independent => deterministic & replay-stable;
    # it picks a single representative value per key (no summing => no creep).
    deduped = (
        cleaned.groupBy("order_id")
               .agg(F.max(F.struct("amount", "category")).alias("rec"))
               .select(
                   F.col("order_id"),
                   F.col("rec.amount").alias("amount"),
                   F.col("rec.category").alias("category"),
               )
    )
    return deduped

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

PAYMENTS = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_payments_seed1337.ndjson"
FX       = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed1337.ndjson"

CAT = "spark_catalog.default."

# ---- flexible field-name candidates (upstream is messy; don't assume exact names)
PAY_TS  = ["event_time","occurred_at","payment_time","payment_ts","ts","timestamp","created_at","time","paid_at"]
PAY_AMT = ["amount","value","foreign_amount","amount_foreign","fx_amount","amt","local_amount"]
PAY_CCY = ["currency","ccy","currency_code","cur"]
PAY_ID  = ["payment_id","id","pid","txn_id","transaction_id"]

FX_TS   = ["rate_ts","ts","timestamp","valid_from","effective_time","effective_ts","event_time","as_of","time"]
FX_RATE = ["rate","fx_rate","usd_rate","rate_to_usd","usd_per_unit","price"]
FX_CCY  = ["currency","ccy","currency_code","cur"]
FX_SEQ  = ["seq","sequence","lsn","offset","_seq","version","commit_seq","change_seq","__seq"]
FX_OP   = ["op","operation","_op","change_type","cdc_op","__op"]


def m(mapcol, keys):
    # map getItem returns null for absent keys -> coalesce picks the present one
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(mapcol)[k] for k in keys])


def to_epoch(s):
    # Normalize to UTC epoch SECONDS (double). Handles epoch sec/millis strings and ISO-8601.
    is_epoch = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long  = s.cast("long")
    epoch    = F.when(F.length(s) >= F.lit(13), (as_long / F.lit(1000.0))).otherwise(as_long.cast("double"))
    iso      = F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(s)).cast("double")  # ISO w/ offset -> correct instant
    return F.when(s.isNull(), F.lit(None).cast("double")).when(is_epoch, epoch).otherwise(iso)


def to_utc_date(epoch_secs):
    # UTC calendar day WITHOUT touching session timezone: days since 1970-01-01
    days = F.floor(epoch_secs / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int")
    return F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), days)


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(PAYMENTS)
    j = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", "map<string,string>"))
    return j.select(
        m("j", PAY_ID).alias("payment_id"),
        m("j", PAY_CCY).alias("currency"),
        m("j", PAY_AMT).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        to_epoch(m("j", PAY_TS)).alias("pay_epoch"),
        F.col("value").alias("raw"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_quarantine")
def payments_quarantine():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "payments_parsed")
    bad = F.col("pay_epoch").isNull() | F.col("amount").isNull() | F.col("currency").isNull()
    return p.where(bad).select("raw")


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_rates_clean")
def fx_rates_clean():
    raw = SparkSession.active().read.text(FX)
    j = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json("value", "map<string,string>"))
    base = j.select(
        m("j", FX_CCY).alias("currency"),
        m("j", FX_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        to_epoch(m("j", FX_TS)).alias("rate_epoch"),
        m("j", FX_SEQ).cast("long").alias("seq"),
        F.lower(m("j", FX_OP)).alias("op"),
    )
    # exclude CDC deletes so a deleted rate cannot be applied
    base = base.where(F.col("op").isNull() | ~F.col("op").isin("d", "delete", "remove"))
    base = base.where(
        F.col("currency").isNotNull() & F.col("rate_epoch").isNotNull() & F.col("rate").isNotNull()
    )
    # deterministic dedup per (currency, rate_epoch): keep latest CDC sequence
    w = Window.partitionBy("currency", "rate_epoch").orderBy(F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last())
    return (base.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .drop("_rn", "op"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")
def payments_enriched():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    p = spark.read.table(CAT + "payments_parsed").where(
        F.col("pay_epoch").isNotNull() & F.col("amount").isNotNull() & F.col("currency").isNotNull()
    )
    r = spark.read.table(CAT + "fx_rates_clean")

    # as-of join: only rates in effect at/before the payment instant (never a future rate)
    cond = (p["currency"] == r["currency"]) & (r["rate_epoch"] <= p["pay_epoch"])
    joined = p.alias("p").join(r.alias("r"), cond, "left")

    pkey = F.coalesce(F.col("p.payment_id"), F.sha2(F.col("p.raw"), 256))
    joined = joined.withColumn("_pkey", pkey)

    # pick the most-recent in-effect rate per payment; deterministic tiebreak on seq
    w = Window.partitionBy("_pkey").orderBy(
        F.col("r.rate_epoch").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("r.seq").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    picked = joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)

    return picked.select(
        F.col("p.payment_id").alias("payment_id"),
        F.col("p.currency").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p.amount").alias("amount"),
        F.col("r.rate").alias("rate"),
        (F.col("p.amount") * F.col("r.rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
        F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("r.rate_epoch").cast("long")).alias("rate_ts"),
        to_utc_date(F.col("p.pay_epoch")).alias("settlement_date"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    e = SparkSession.active().read.table(CAT + "payments_enriched")
    return (e.where(F.col("usd_amount").isNotNull())
             .groupBy(F.col("settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"))
             .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window, functions as F

PAY_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

PAY_SCHEMA = ("payment_id STRING, id STRING, txn_id STRING, transaction_id STRING, "
              "amount STRING, value STRING, amount_foreign STRING, foreign_amount STRING, "
              "currency STRING, ccy STRING, currency_code STRING, curr STRING, "
              "event_time STRING, ts STRING, occurred_at STRING, timestamp STRING, "
              "created_at STRING, payment_time STRING, time STRING")

FX_SCHEMA = ("currency STRING, ccy STRING, currency_code STRING, curr STRING, "
             "rate STRING, fx_rate STRING, usd_rate STRING, rate_to_usd STRING, "
             "rate_ts STRING, ts STRING, effective_at STRING, effective_time STRING, "
             "valid_from STRING, timestamp STRING, as_of STRING, time STRING, "
             "event_time STRING, seq STRING, sequence STRING, version STRING, op STRING")


def _coalesce(*names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])


def _to_epoch(c):
    """Absolute UTC epoch-seconds (double) from epoch(ms/s) or offset-bearing ISO."""
    s = c.cast("string")
    digits = s.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = s.cast("long")
    return (F.when(digits & (F.length(s) >= 13), as_long / 1000.0)
             .when(digits & (F.length(s) <= 10), as_long.cast("double"))
             .when(digits, as_long / 1000.0)
             .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(s)).cast("double")))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_parsed")
def payments_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = (spark.read.text(PAY_PATH)
              .select(F.from_json("value", PAY_SCHEMA).alias("j")))
    f = j.select("j.*")
    amount = _coalesce("amount", "value", "amount_foreign", "foreign_amount")
    amount_num = F.regexp_replace(amount.cast("string"), r"[^0-9eE.\-]", "").cast("double")
    ccy = _coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr")
    pid = _coalesce("payment_id", "id", "txn_id", "transaction_id")
    tcol = _coalesce("event_time", "ts", "occurred_at", "timestamp",
                     "created_at", "payment_time", "time")
    return f.select(
        pid.alias("p_id"),
        F.upper(ccy).alias("p_ccy"),
        amount_num.alias("p_amount"),
        _to_epoch(tcol).alias("p_epoch"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_parsed")
def fx_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    j = (spark.read.text(FX_PATH)
              .select(F.from_json("value", FX_SCHEMA).alias("j")))
    f = j.select("j.*")
    ccy = _coalesce("currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "curr")
    rate = _coalesce("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd")
    rate_num = F.regexp_replace(rate.cast("string"), r"[^0-9eE.\-]", "").cast("double")
    tcol = _coalesce("rate_ts", "ts", "effective_at", "effective_time",
                     "valid_from", "timestamp", "as_of", "time", "event_time")
    seq = _coalesce("seq", "sequence", "version").cast("long")
    op = F.lower(F.coalesce(F.col("op"), F.lit("")))

    base = f.select(
        F.upper(ccy).alias("f_ccy"),
        rate_num.alias("f_rate"),
        _to_epoch(tcol).alias("f_epoch"),
        seq.alias("f_seq"),
        op.alias("f_op"),
    ).where(
        F.col("f_ccy").isNotNull()
        & F.col("f_epoch").isNotNull()
        & F.col("f_rate").isNotNull()
        & (~F.col("f_op").isin("delete", "d"))
    )

    # Dedup the CDC stream: one surviving rate per (currency, effective instant),
    # keeping the highest sequence/version deterministically.
    w = Window.partitionBy("f_ccy", "f_epoch").orderBy(
        F.col("f_seq").desc_nulls_last())
    return (base.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
                .select("f_ccy", "f_rate", "f_epoch", "f_seq"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_enriched")
def payments_enriched():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pay = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_parsed")
    fx = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.fx_parsed")

    # As-of join: candidate rates are same-currency AND effective at-or-before
    # the payment instant (never a rate stamped after the payment).
    cond = (pay["p_ccy"] == fx["f_ccy"]) & (fx["f_epoch"] <= pay["p_epoch"])
    joined = pay.join(fx, cond, "left")

    # Pick the latest in-effect rate per payment.
    w = Window.partitionBy("p_id", "p_epoch", "p_amount", "p_ccy").orderBy(
        F.col("f_epoch").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("f_seq").desc_nulls_last())
    picked = (joined.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
                    .where(F.col("_rn") == 1))

    day_num = F.floor(F.col("p_epoch") / F.lit(86400.0)).cast("int")
    settlement_date = F.date_add(F.to_date(F.lit("1970-01-01")), day_num)

    return picked.select(
        F.col("p_id").alias("payment_id"),
        F.col("p_ccy").alias("currency"),
        F.col("p_amount").alias("foreign_amount"),
        settlement_date.alias("settlement_date"),
        F.col("f_rate").alias("applied_rate"),
        F.timestamp_seconds(F.col("f_epoch").cast("long")).alias("as_applied_rate_ts"),
        (F.col("p_amount") * F.col("f_rate")).alias("usd_amount"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    e = spark.read.table("spark_catalog.default.payments_enriched")
    return (e.where(F.col("settlement_date").isNotNull()
                    & F.col("usd_amount").isNotNull())
             .groupBy("settlement_date")
             .agg(F.sum("usd_amount").alias("usd_total"))
             .select("settlement_date", "usd_total"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Input locations (this seed)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
PAYMENTS_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/safe-spark-agents/.worktrees/dev-sweep/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work_seed_s4/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Read everything as STRING with an explicit (broad) schema so that:
#   * no schema inference / data scan happens at plan-build time
#     (avoids ATTEMPT_ANALYSIS_IN_PIPELINE_QUERY_FUNCTION), and
#   * candidate column names that are absent in the data simply become NULL
#     and are harmlessly coalesced away.
PAYMENTS_SCHEMA = (
    "payment_id string, id string, "
    "currency string, ccy string, currency_code string, "
    "amount string, value string, paid_amount string, amount_original string, "
    "event_time string, event_timestamp string, payment_time string, "
    "payment_timestamp string, ts string, timestamp string, created_at string, "
    "occurred_at string, payment_date string, settlement_date string, "
    "date string, event_date string"
)

FX_SCHEMA = (
    "currency string, ccy string, currency_code string, "
    "rate string, fx_rate string, usd_rate string, rate_to_usd string, "
    "exchange_rate string, "
    "effective_date string, rate_date string, valid_from string, "
    "as_of_date string, date string, valid_from_date string, "
    "change_ts string, commit_ts string, ingested_at string, recorded_at string, "
    "system_ts string, updated_at string, version_ts string, ts string, "
    "timestamp string, change_timestamp string, "
    "version string, version_no string, seq string, revision string, op string"
)


def _first_str(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c) for c in cols])


def _first_dbl(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("double") for c in cols])


def _first_long(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(c).cast("long") for c in cols])


def _first_date(*cols):
    # First 10 chars of an ISO date/timestamp string == its UTC calendar day,
    # which is timezone-independent (no session-conf mutation required).
    return F.coalesce(*[F.to_date(F.substring(F.col(c), 1, 10)) for c in cols])


def _first_ts(*cols):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.to_timestamp(F.col(c)) for c in cols])


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Source: payments, normalized to (pid, currency, amount, settlement_date)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="payments_src")
def payments_src():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(PAYMENTS_SCHEMA).json(PAYMENTS_PATH)

    date_cols = ["payment_date", "settlement_date", "date", "event_date"]
    ts_cols = [
        "event_time", "event_timestamp", "payment_time", "payment_timestamp",
        "ts", "timestamp", "created_at", "occurred_at",
    ]

    return df.select(
        F.monotonically_increasing_id().alias("pid"),
        _first_str("currency", "ccy", "currency_code").alias("currency"),
        _first_dbl("amount", "value", "paid_amount", "amount_original").alias("amount"),
        F.coalesce(
            _first_date(*date_cols),
            _first_date(*ts_cols),
        ).alias("settlement_date"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Source: fx rate CDC versions, normalized.
#   biz_date  = business-effective date the rate version applies to
#   rec_ts    = transaction time (when the version/correction was recorded)
#   rec_date  = UTC calendar day of rec_ts
#   ver       = monotonic version/sequence (tie-breaker)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="fx_versions")
def fx_versions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX_PATH)

    biz_cols = [
        "effective_date", "rate_date", "valid_from",
        "as_of_date", "date", "valid_from_date",
    ]
    rec_cols = [
        "change_ts", "commit_ts", "ingested_at", "recorded_at", "system_ts",
        "updated_at", "version_ts", "ts", "timestamp", "change_timestamp",
    ]

    return df.select(
        _first_str("currency", "ccy", "currency_code").alias("fx_currency"),
        _first_dbl("rate", "fx_rate", "usd_rate", "rate_to_usd", "exchange_rate").alias("rate"),
        _first_date(*biz_cols).alias("biz_date"),
        _first_ts(*rec_cols).alias("rec_ts"),
        _first_date(*rec_cols).alias("rec_date"),
        _first_long("version", "version_no", "seq", "revision").alias("ver"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bitemporal as-of join + daily USD totals.
#
# For each payment (currency c, date d) pick the rate version that was OFFICIALLY
# IN EFFECT ON d:
#   * business-time slice: biz_date <= d   (latest effective rate as of d)
#   * transaction-time slice: rec_date <= d (exclude later corrections)
# Among survivors choose: latest biz_date, then latest rec_ts, then highest ver.
# This guarantees that a correction recorded AFTER the payment's own date is
# never applied, so reprocessing yields a stable, reproducible result.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    pays = spark.read.table("payments_src")
    fx = spark.read.table("fx_versions")

    joined = (
        pays.join(fx, pays["currency"] == fx["fx_currency"], "inner")
        .where(F.col("biz_date").isNotNull())
        .where(F.col("rec_date").isNotNull())
        .where(F.col("biz_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
        .where(F.col("rec_date") <= F.col("settlement_date"))
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("pid").orderBy(
        F.col("biz_date").desc(),
        F.col("rec_ts").desc(),
        F.col("ver").desc(),
    )

    picked = (
        joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
        .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
        .select(
            F.col("settlement_date"),
            (F.col("amount") * F.col("rate")).alias("usd_value"),
        )
    )

    return (
        picked.groupBy("settlement_date")
        .agg(F.sum("usd_value").alias("usd_total"))
        .select("settlement_date", "usd_total")
    )

    seq = F.coalesce(F.col("seq"), F.col("sequence"), F.col("version")).cast("long")

    subj = F.coalesce(F.col("subject"), F.lit(""))
    norm = F.lower(F.trim(subj))

    is_blank = F.length(F.trim(subj)) == 0

    is_spam = _matches(norm, SPAM_KW)
    is_urgent = _matches(norm, URGENT_KW)
    is_routing = _matches(norm, ROUTING_KW)

    category = (
        F.when(is_blank, F.lit("info"))          # blank -> deterministic default
         .when(is_spam, F.lit("spam"))
         .when(is_urgent, F.lit("urgent"))
         .when(is_routing, F.lit("routing"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("info"))
    )

    return df.select(
        F.col("email_id"),
        F.col("subject"),
        category.alias("category"),
    )

    "rv:", "tr:", "enc:", "i:",
)


def classify(subject):
    # Blank / null / whitespace-only subjects: cannot be keyword-matched, so
    # tag deterministically as info instead of mis-routing.
    if subject is None:
        return "info"
    s = subject.strip().lower()
    if s == "":
        return "info"

    def has(words):
        return any(w in s for w in words)

    if has(SPAM):
        return "spam"
    if has(URGENT):
        return "urgent"
    if s.startswith(ROUTING_PREFIXES) or has(ROUTING):
        return "routing"
    return "info"


classify_udf = F.udf(classify, StringType())
